overall.description: Static shot of a gothic dining hall interior from a video game, featuring a massive skeleton suspended from vaulted ceilings, students in dark robes seated at wooden tables, and tall arched windows casting warm natural light across the stone interior.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a grand gothic dining hall with a massive skeleton suspended from the ceiling. Students in dark robes sit at wooden tables while natural light streams through tall arched windows. A student walks across the foreground from right to left, passing between the camera and the dining tables.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric view of a grand gothic dining hall that remains focused on the interplay between its monumental architecture and the quiet activity within. It begins with a wide perspective of the stone interior, where a massive skeleton hangs suspended from the vaulted ceilings above students seated at long wooden tables. As natural light streams through tall arched windows to illuminate the scene, the stillness is momentarily broken by a student in dark robes. The camera maintains its position as this figure walks across the foreground from right to left, passing between the lens and the dining area before the view settles back into the silent grandeur of the hall.
